title: Preparing for the worst: RAF Lossiemouth tests response to airfield emergency

sections.heading: What happened
sections.content: Personnel from the base have been training alongside members of the civilian emergency services

sections.heading: Key details
sections.content: Preparing for the worst: RAF Lossiemouth tests response to airfield emergency RAF personnel trained closely with members of the emergency services

sections.heading: Why it matters
sections.content: RAF Lossiemouth has been testing its capability to deal with an emergency incident while continuing to protect the UK northern airspace. Personnel have been training alongside civilian emergency services on the base as part of Exercise Agile Warrior.

sourceReferences.citationText: serper-scottish-aviation – Preparing for the worst: RAF Lossiemouth tests response to airfield emergency
